title: mentha subtomentella var. microphylla
intro: Mentha subtomentella var. microphylla, also known as the dwarf peppermint, is a subspecies of the Mentha subtomentella plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha subtomentella var. microphylla include its ability to alleviate nausea, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
